No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權) directly promotes the rule of law, aligning with Target 16.3.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances knowledge sharing and scientific cooperation (Target 17.6) by inviting scholars to lecture on recent mathematical research results.
